SecondaryAuthStatusIsEnabled Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns a flag indicating whether two-factor authentication is enabled. If this value is false, two-factor authentication is not required.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Session
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public bool IsEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: Boolean
